title: Serendipitous twist in a hemithioindigo molecular motor enables energy storage
abstract: Published online: 29 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41557-026-02191-w Hemithioindigo-based molecular motors are driven by visible light and their rotation has been branded as ‘sunlight-powered’, but for a decade this ability has remained unexploited. Now, a subtle change in their structure leads to a serendipitous ‘supercharged’ intermediate, ready to store the Sun’s energy.

title: The interplay between <mark>stack pressure</mark>, mechanical expansion and degradation pathways in lithium-ion batteries
abstract: Published online: 29 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41560-026-02087-6 While electrochemical degradation in lithium-ion batteries is well studied, the role of <mark>stack pressure</mark> in long-term cycling remains unclear. Here the researchers use a high-precision pressure-controlled dilatometry tool to optimize <mark>stack pressure</mark> and understand how it prolongs battery lifetime.
